name: Le Bisse
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs with sugar until pale and frothy.
2. Add melted butter and zest.
3. Fold in flour and salt and knead well.
4. Wrap dough and chill for 1 hour.
5. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
6. Lightly spray two cookie sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
7. To make cookies: take a small ball of dough and roll into a sausage shape, about 1/2 inch thick by 5 inches long. Curve the sausage into an "s" shape and place on a cookie sheet. Repeat until all dough is used.
8. Bake for 5 minutes at 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
9. Reduce heat to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) and bake another 15 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Cool slightly on the cookie sheets, then transfer to a cooling rack.
